title: The Angry Ghast
description: Three new Ghast themed bosses, one for each dimension
body:
After the Vanilla (sad) Ghast and the Happy Ghast... wasn't something missing? Introducing: The Angry Ghast – a mod that adds three new Ghast-themed bosses, one for each dimension!
How do you spawn one of the three bosses? The first step is finding a Burnt Ghast in a cave: (Or you can craft one if you don't have time) Next, you'll need to heal it by surrounding it with Snow in a Crafting Table Now, all you need to do is place the Healed Ghast on the ground, and the boss of the corresponding dimension will be summoned after a few seconds! (It's recommended – though not required – to follow this order: Overworld, Nether, End) Have fun with three new bosses, unlock ten new advancements, and collect twelve unique items and weapons! [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-angry-ghast)
